title: Social media – Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Social media : Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
Get access to Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada’s official social media channels. Read the terms and conditions .
Share your thoughts and stories. “Like” the Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada Facebook page
Follow Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada on LinkedIn for information on job fairs, opportunities to work at IRCC, and more.
Watch videos on IRCC’s YouTube channel

## Our videos in other languages
Some of our videos available to you in 16 other languages. To watch them, visit one of our YouTube playlist:
- Bulgarian ( български )
- Italian ( Italiano )
- Portuguese ( Português )
Follow us at Immigration, Refugees and Immigration Canada
Get to know the experiences of immigrants and new Canadian citizens by engaging with us on Instagram. Follow Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada on Instagram
Sign up for RSS, newsletter and email updates .
